_comment: Regression test baseline. Updated by the regression-tester agent. Each key is a test name, value is {status, last_run, notes}.
_note: Partial run: test app build failed (issue #941 — 3 Swift files missing from Xcode project). Tested against connected social app stuck on LoadingViewController.

pepper connects.notes: ping returns pong, look returns screen data (14 interactive, 5 text on community tab)

look returns elements.notes: 14 interactive, 5 text elements on community tab screen

tap by text.notes: Tapped 'Health' tab, screen changed from 'fi' to 'health_view' (programmatic_tab)

back navigation.notes: back command returned 'Navigated back'; app ended on loading screen (no network)

input text into field.notes: Skipped: app stuck on loading screen, no text fields available. Test app build failed (issue #941).

dismiss keyboard.notes: Skipped: no keyboard to dismiss (app on loading screen). Test app build failed (issue #941).

scroll to element.notes: Skipped: not enough scrollable content on loading screen. Previously fail (lazy list items).

look scope filtering.notes: Skipped: limited UI on loading screen. Previously pass.

look compact mode.notes: Skipped: limited UI on loading screen. Previously fail (returns full output, not diff).

find by predicate.notes: Skipped: MCP tools not available (venv missing in worktree). find requires MCP tool. Previously pass.

read element properties.notes: read command requires accessibility ID; text-based lookup not supported. No change from previous run.

appearance toggle.notes: Skipped: appearance command only available via MCP tool. Previously pass.

network monitoring.notes: Skipped: network commands only available via MCP tool. Previously pass.

network simulate latency.notes: Skipped: requires MCP tools and test app. Test app build failed (issue #941).

network simulate fail_status.notes: Skipped: requires MCP tools and test app. Test app build failed (issue #941).

network simulate fail_error.notes: Skipped: requires MCP tools and test app. Test app build failed (issue #941).

network simulate throttle.notes: Skipped: requires MCP tools and test app. Test app build failed (issue #941).

network simulate offline.notes: Skipped: requires MCP tools and test app. Test app build failed (issue #941).

network simulate presets.notes: Skipped: requires MCP tools. Test app build failed (issue #941).

network conditions lifecycle.notes: Skipped: requires MCP tools. Test app build failed (issue #941).

network mock lifecycle.notes: Skipped: requires MCP tools and test app. Test app build failed (issue #941).

network clear mocks.notes: Skipped: requires MCP tools. Test app build failed (issue #941).

network websocket log and status.notes: Skipped: requires MCP tools and test app WebSocket Client screen. Test app build failed (issue #941).

console capture.notes: Skipped: console commands only available via MCP tool. Previously pass.

timeline flight recorder.notes: Skipped: timeline command only available via MCP tool. Previously pass.

vars inspect.notes: Skipped: vars_inspect command only available via MCP tool. Previously pass.

defaults read.notes: Skipped: defaults command only available via MCP tool. Previously pass.

snapshot save and diff.notes: snapshot CLI returned 4 elements (Retry, Log out, Environment, 1 unnamed) on loading screen

accessibility audit.notes: Skipped: accessibility_audit command only available via MCP tool. Previously pass.

tree dump.notes: Returned 4-node view hierarchy (UIWindow → UITransitionView → UIDropShadowView → UILayoutContainerView)

look on empty screen.notes: Returns without error on loading screen (0 interactive, 1 text). Functional but minimal.

tap nonexistent element.notes: Returns 'Element not found by text: ... not found anywhere in the view hierarchy' — clear error, no crash
